notes: Assets & CMDB now shows only customer-created/imported records. The hardcoded 1,248 demo asset inventory has been removed from the customer UI.
Adds persistent Assets & CMDB storage with multi-sheet Excel/CSV import. Imported spreadsheet column names are preserved and visible on asset detail records.
Adds Reliable Hubs inventory workbook support: Laptop/Desktop/Mobile/One Drive/IP camera style sheets import cleanly, and YES/NO or TRUE/FALSE columns render as checkboxes.
Adds manual add, edit, and delete actions for Assets & CMDB records.
Shows user-created confirmation as a dismissible popup instead of a persistent page message.
Adds Admin > Manage User Project Access so admins can add or remove employees from projects and set per-project roles after account creation.
Improves incident register readability by using a high-contrast ticket ID link color on dark rows.
Hardens backend startup schema handling to avoid noisy multi-worker table creation warnings while preserving database volumes and customer data.
Includes validation that fresh Assets & CMDB stats return zero when no assets have been added.
Assets & CMDB now presents imported Excel workbooks as worksheet tabs instead of one flattened inventory list.
Reliable Hubs inventory import now keeps rows from all workbook tabs, including license, network, email, employee checklist, phone/SIM, software compliance, and UPS worksheets.
Adds guarded row selection before edit/delete actions in Assets & CMDB to reduce accidental changes.
Update Center now synchronizes the displayed current version from the running backend container when an upgrade completed but the agent final report was missed.
